title: cordia diffusa
intro: Cordia diffusa, also known as Vidanga, is a plant species native to tropical Asia and is a member of the Bignoniaceae family. The plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Cordia diffusa include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Cordia diffusa typically include the dried and powdered fruit, which is used to make capsules, tablets, and decoctions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
